question: Between Max Verstappen and Charles Leclerc in the Abu Dhabi 2025 race session, who had the shorter stationary pit stop?
answer: Charles Leclerc had the shorter stationary pit stop at 20.902 seconds.
sql: SELECT p.driver_number, MIN(p.pit_duration) AS best_pit_duration FROM raw.pit p WHERE p.session_key = 9839 AND p.driver_number IN (1, 16) GROUP BY p.driver_number ORDER BY best_pit_duration ASC

sql: SELECT l.driver_number, l.lap_number, l.lap_duration FROM core.laps_enriched l WHERE l.session_key = 9839 ORDER BY l.lap_duration ASC LIMIT 10

question: Compare Max Verstappen and Charles Leclerc on lap pace in the Abu Dhabi 2025 race session.
answer: Leclerc had the faster best lap, while Verstappen was slightly stronger on consistency over the full race distance.
sql: SELECT driver_number, full_name, best_lap, avg_lap, lap_stddev FROM core.driver_session_summary WHERE session_key = 9839 AND driver_number IN (1, 16)
